title: User authorization for Databricks Apps will soon be available for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
In early June 2026, user authorization for Databricks Apps will be automatically enabled for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled. User authorization allows apps to act with the identity of the app user, so apps can access resources on the user's behalf while enforcing the user's existing permissions.

See [User authorization](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/auth#user-authorization).
